name: TEMPLATE_NAME
description: TEMPLATE_DESCRIPTION — one sentence explaining what this node does on the network.

command.description: Public command this node accepts from any sender. Every input port is an MCP tool the brain can call — keep the inputSchema tight.

tick.description: Optional heartbeat from the clock node. Remove this port (and its binding) if you don't need a periodic wake.

reply.description: Human-facing reply, wired to chat.response by default (the chat UI + bridges listen there).

event.description: Structured event this node emits for downstream nodes to react to.
